original_snippet_context: Discussion of political maneuvering and shifting stances on financial policy, contrasting prior commitments (e.g., the "estatuto do Sr. Murtinho") with more recent legislative actions (the "projecto do Sr. David Campista") perceived as contradictory.
relevant_quote: Em relação ao illustre Sr. Affonso Penna, a quem se attribuem igualmente opiniões accordes com as do Sr. Campista, sobre a caixa de conversão: — Que razão teve S. Ex. para, em menos de um anno, mostrar-se solidário com o Sr. Murtinho e solidário com o Sr. Campista?
justification: The text questions the seemingly contradictory stances of Sr. Affonso Penna regarding the "caixa de conversão" without explicitly endorsing either the orthodox or expansionist view. It focuses on the inconsistency of political figures rather than arguing for a specific monetary policy.
